overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cinematic video game (Red Dead Redemption 2) showing a character walking through a foggy, gas-lit historic city street at night. The character traverses muddy cobblestone roads with tram tracks, passing brick commercial buildings and a large white mansion, as light rain begins to fall midway through the clip.

scene_state.functional_zone: historic commercial street with gas lamps and tram tracks

events.description: horse-drawn carriage passes by on the right side of the street

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the muddy cobblestone street past red brick commercial buildings

notable_agents.action: horse-drawn carriage moving along the street and passing the character

entered.detail: two-story red brick building with Hotel Imperial and Cafe Bellevue signage
cast iron street lamps emitting warm yellow light through the fog
metal railway tracks embedded in the muddy cobblestone street
decorative black iron railing on the second floor of the building

segments.scene_description: The character walks down a foggy, gas-lit commercial street at night, passing red brick buildings with visible signage for Hotel Imperial and Cafe Bellevue. The muddy cobblestone road features embedded tram tracks. A horse-drawn carriage passes by on the right around the 12-second mark, moving through the misty atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: residential street with large white mansion

events.description: light rain begins to fall, creating ripples on the wet cobblestones

agents.ego_description: continuing down the street as rain begins to fall, approaching the large white mansion

entered.detail: large two-story white building with multiple green shuttered windows and balconies
stacked wooden barrels on the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a more open area dominated by a large white mansion with distinctive green shutters on the right. Light rain begins to fall around the 20-second mark, creating a wet sheen on the cobblestones. The red commercial buildings from the previous section recede behind as the character moves forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow passage with archway and covered walkway

events.description: character walks under a stone archway into a more enclosed passage

agents.ego_description: walking through the rain toward a stone archway and gated dead end

entered.detail: stone tunnel archway providing partial cover from the rain
black wrought iron fence running along the building side
building facade with bright green painted doors and shutters
metal gate blocking the end of the street

segments.scene_description: The street narrows as the character approaches a stone archway, walking under partial cover from the building overhangs. The rain continues to fall heavily. The white mansion recedes behind as the character passes green-doored buildings and an iron fence, approaching a gated dead end at the conclusion of the clip.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a foggy, gas-lit city street that transitions from a commercial district into a rain-slicked residential dead end. It begins by following a character past red brick buildings and signage for the Hotel Imperial and Cafe Bellevue, moving along muddy cobblestones and tram tracks as a horse-drawn carriage passes through the mist. As the commercial buildings recede, the scene opens up to reveal a large white mansion with green shutters, while a light rain begins to fall and creates a wet sheen on the ground. The environment then shifts as the street narrows, leading the character under building overhangs and past green-doored houses and an iron fence. Finally, the rain intensifies as the camera moves through a stone archway toward a gated dead end.
